rejected_patterns: biotechnology and medical-device momentum without infrastructure linkage
generic enterprise software or SaaS with unclear AI infrastructure monetization
consumer retail, media, restaurants, and entertainment names outside the target context
banks, asset managers, insurers, and finance platforms without direct bitcoin infrastructure exposure
opaque AI, crypto, or technology labels without supported operating-business evidence
auto and consumer-electronics adjacency without clear power, semiconductor, defense, or infrastructure exposure
lower-conviction watch items with weaker context fit than the forwarded set
